name: Cat Lottery Shop
short_description: The cat has owned a lottery store. Now it can buy lottery tickets to its heart's content. Anyway, it wants to get rich! It dreams of getting rich overnight! But is it really going to be that simple? (^=◕ᴥ◕=^)
detailed_description:
This is a simulation management game.

Sell lottery tickets and scratch-off cards to cat customers.

Purchase lottery tickets, and a daily draw after each day will determine the corresponding prizes.

Scratch off tickets to immediately receive corresponding rewards.

Search through customers' leftover scratch-offs to collect overlooked prizes.

Invest in stocks, place bets on prediction games—higher risks, greater rewards.

Redecorate your shop, hire staff to automate operations, and work hard to attract more cat customers.

Trade with mysterious figures for lottery draw numbers to boost your winning odds.

There’s more to this world than meets the eye.

*languages with full audio support
